title: Rake Tool
description: Rakes to pick up leaf-litter quicker.
body:
# Rake (Tool) – Pick Up Leaf Litter Quicker
![Picking up leaf litter with an iron rake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLC95J8S/images/62c169ad9198e6f5fe2e162c2de3c0fd78970671.gif)

I got _so_ annoyed by leaf litter, I spent _hours_ making this mod instead of just ignoring them like a normal person. Now you can craft rakes to scoop up leaf litter and dead bushes in big chunks. Iron does a 3x3 area, gold 5x5, diamond 7x7, and netherite clears a glorious 9x9. It’s overkill. You’re welcome.

## Features:
🧹 Craftable Rakes - Clean up leaf litter and dead bushes in bulk with four glorious tiers:
- Iron Rake – Clears a 3×3 area.
- Golden Rake – Clears a 5×5 area.
- Diamond Rake – Clears a 7×7 area.
- Netherite Rake – Clears a ridiculous 9×9 area. Completely unnecessary. Absolutely satisfying.

🍂 Mass Cleanup Made Easy

- Rakes instantly remove leaf piles and dead bushes around the block you target. Just right-click, and watch nature get obliterated.

💎 No Durability

- Rakes never break. They're eternal. Like our resentment toward leaf litter.

🏜️ Also Works on Dead Bushes

- Because why stop at leaves? Desert players, we see you.

![All 4 rake tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLC95J8S/images/42c17bc15e5f55f7c284b4e6abd9c3c8d727595b.png)

![Iron Rake Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLC95J8S/images/083387aa11d1a4f981029c312e50c8cf728e0028.png)

![Golden Rake Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLC95J8S/images/c89bf9aa534ea5831349c05bb5b9fd3839989b14.png)

![Diamond Rake Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLC95J8S/images/d071f1894eb4526b6b53419a7f23af62ceeb19a9.png)

![Netherite Rake Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLC95J8S/images/ecac13ad3d0f03fab57fe628488d4bce38fb6eb0.png)
